response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar

ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_name : varchar

ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_name : varchar

ENTITY ProductionOrder
PK production_order_id
ATTR production_order_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_id : integer : FK
ATTR sequence : integer
ATTR scheduled_date : date
ATTR start_time : timestamp
ATTR quantity : float

REL ProductionOrder -> Client : 0..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
REL ProductionOrder -> Material : 0..N -> 1 : FK=material_id
REL ProductionOrder -> Operation : 0..N -> 1 : FK=operation_id
